posts.title: Why AI Agents Need Governance Before They Need More Power
posts.excerpt: Most AI coding agents execute with zero oversight. They can delete files, push to main, and expose secrets — all in a single tool call. Here's why governance at the execution layer changes everything.

posts.title: 20 Safety Invariants Every AI Agent Should Respect
posts.excerpt: We built 20 invariants into AgentGuard that catch destructive patterns before they execute. From secret exposure to force-push protection, here's what they are and why they matter.

posts.title: The Governed Action Kernel: How AgentGuard Makes Every AI Action Auditable
posts.excerpt: Every action an AI agent takes passes through a 7-stage pipeline: propose, normalize, evaluate, simulate, execute, emit, persist. This is how we built a deterministic governance layer.
